name: File Explorer
description: Full-featured file explorer with context menus, drag-and-drop, and file operations.
author: bootstrapper-js

name: Terminal
description: xterm.js-powered terminal with tabbed sessions, shell commands, and VFS access.
author: bootstrapper-js

name: Settings
description: System settings and preferences — wallpaper, layout, window manager, widgets, keybindings, and storage.
author: bootstrapper-js

name: App Drawer
description: Full-screen app launcher with pinned apps, recent history, and category browsing.
author: bootstrapper-js

name: App Manager
description: Install and manage apps from registries. Supports custom registry URLs with per-app install/uninstall.
author: bootstrapper-js

name: Spotlight Search
description: Global search overlay triggered by Ctrl+K / Cmd+K. Searches apps, commands, and VFS files.
author: bootstrapper-js

name: SQLite Browser
description: Browse and query SQLite .db files stored in the VFS. Powered by sql.js (WASM).
author: bootstrapper-js

name: NN IDE
description: Neural network IDE for designing and training models visually in the browser.
author: bootstrapper-js

name: WAMP Client
description: WebSocket Application Messaging Protocol client for real-time pub/sub and RPC.
author: bootstrapper-js
